  [ch]Em7[/ch] - X22033


[Verse]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 I didn't mean it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
When I said I didn't love you so[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 I should have held on tight[/tab]
I never should've let you go
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 I didn't know nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I was stupid[/tab]
I was foolish
[tab]        [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I was lying to myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
 I couldn't have fathomed that I would ever[/tab]
Be without your love
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 Never imagined I'd be[/tab]
Sitting here beside myself
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
 'Guess I didn't know you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
'Guess I didn't know me[/tab]
But I thought I knew everything
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
I never felt[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
 The feeling that I'm feeling[/tab]
Now that I don't
Hear your voice
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Or have your touch and kiss your lips[/tab]
'Cause I don't have a choice
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, what I wouldn't give[/tab]
To have you lying by my side
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Right here, 'cause baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
When you left[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]
I lost a part of me[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]                  
It's still so hard to believe[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
 Come back baby please, 'cause[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We belong together[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Who else am I gonna lean on[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
When times get rough?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Em7[/ch]
Who's gonna talk to me on the phone[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Till the sun comes up?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Who's gonna take your place?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
There ain't nobody better[/tab]
Oh baby, baby
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We belong together[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
When you are on my mind[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em7[/ch]                      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Bobby Womack's on the radio[/tab]
Singing to me

I need you
